notes: Per-test-id count budget for Bandit findings in api/core/kernel.
Each key is a Bandit test-id (https://bandit.readthedocs.io/en/latest/plugins/index.html).
B201 flask_debug_true / B301 pickle / B306 mktemp_q
The baseline is empty on purpose: the first CI run will fail on EVERY
existing high/medium finding. Bump test-ids one by one with a justified
PR (fix preferred ; budget only when the fix is non-trivial). This is
the same ratchet model as quality/mypy-baseline.json and
